detaileddescription.para:
Constructor for the DeRhamComplex class
params
The parameters needed to construct the class correctly

briefdescription.para: Getter for the number of ghost cells.

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::ParserExecutor< 4 > func, amrex::Real t, DeRhamField< primal, Space::node > &)=0
memberdef.name: projection

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::ParserExecutor< 4 > func, amrex::Real t, DeRhamField< primal, Space::cell > &)=0
memberdef.name: projection

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::ParserExecutor< 4 > func, amrex::Real t, DeRhamField< dual, Space::node > &)=0
memberdef.name: projection

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::ParserExecutor< 4 > func, amrex::Real t, DeRhamField< dual, Space::cell > &)=0
memberdef.name: projection

briefdescription.para: Base class for discrete de Rham Complexes. The member functions with the inline specifier implement the methods of the elements of the Complex (the functions of the fields). The projections are virtual functions, whose details are implemented in the inherited subclasses.
